description_long: This object appears to be an abstract, low-detail representation of a human figure, likely intended to depict an adult pedestrian. The form is highly angular and faceted, with sharp edges and flat planes, lacking any discernible anatomical features such as limbs, head, or torso details. The surface is predominantly dark, with some areas reflecting light, suggesting a glossy or semi-reflective finish. There are no visible textures, clothing details, or accessories, and the silhouette is blocky and geometric. The overall shape is tall and upright, with a vertical orientation that loosely mimics the proportions of a standing adult. The lack of fine detail and the abstract nature make it difficult to distinguish any specific gender, age, or attire.
description: A highly abstract, angular, and faceted representation of an adult pedestrian with a dark, glossy surface and no discernible anatomical or clothing details.
description_view_0: This view is almost entirely black, with no discernible features visible.
description_view_1: This view shows sharp, angular planes and a partial outline of the figure, with some reflective surfaces catching light.
description_view_2: This view reveals a close-up of the lower portion, emphasizing the flat, faceted surfaces and the dark, glossy material.
description_view_3: This view highlights the tall, upright silhouette and the sharp, geometric edges, with a strong contrast between light and shadow.
attribute_clothing_type: undefined abstract form with no visible clothing details
